title: Maria Berardinelli
content:
People.ContactEmail mberardinelli@mtiplus.ca
Maria is a paraprofessional with over 16 years of experience as an immigration paralegal. Maria specializes in a wide variety of immigration matters, including temporary work permits, Labour Market Impact Assessment (LMIA), Certificates of Acceptance (CAQ) and study permits.
She speaks fluent English, French and Italian.
